meta.question: List the configuration tables involved in wavefront calibration.
meta.finalAnswer:
Configuration tables involved in wavefront calibration:

- **Wavefront Calibration Lookup Table**
  - (package) http://api.koneksys.com/cameo/TMT/package/TMT::Project::Work%20Packages::Telescope::WorkPackages::Control::Alignment%20and%20Phasing%20System::Systems%20Engineering::01%20Components::Operational::APS::Conceptual%20Design::Configuration%20Tables::Wavefront%20Calibration%20Lookup%20Table
  - (block) http://api.koneksys.com/cameo/TMT/block/TMT::Project::Work%20Packages::Telescope::WorkPackages::Control::Alignment%20and%20Phasing%20System::Systems%20Engineering::01%20Components::Operational::APS::Conceptual%20Design::Configuration%20Tables::Wavefront%20Calibration%20Lookup%20Table

- **Wavefront Calibration Lookup Table Entry**
  - http://api.koneksys.com/cameo/TMT/block/TMT::Project::Work%20Packages::Telescope::WorkPackages::Control::Alignment%20and%20Phasing%20System::Systems%20Engineering::01%20Components::Operational::APS::Conceptual%20Design::Configuration%20Tables::Wavefront%20Calibration%20Lookup%20Table::Wavefront%20Calibration%20Lookup%20Table%20Entry

request.query:
BASE <http://api.koneksys.com/cameo/>
PREFIX vocab: <http://api.koneksys.com/cameo/vocab/>
PREFIX rdf:   <http://www.w3.org/1999/02/22-rdf-syntax-ns#>
SELECT DISTINCT ?elem ?name WHERE {
  ?elem rdf:type ?type .
  ?elem vocab:NamedElement_name ?name .
  FILTER(CONTAINS(LCASE(STR(?name)), LCASE("wavefront")))
  FILTER(CONTAINS(LCASE(STR(?name)), LCASE("calib")) || CONTAINS(LCASE(STR(?name)), LCASE("calibration")) || CONTAINS(LCASE(STR(?name)), LCASE("config")))
}
LIMIT 25

request.message: The initial search returned many elements whose names include “wavefront” and calibration-related terms, including the specific configuration-table package and its lookup table plus entries.
